comment: "Overall, the course was very informative and well-structured. I appreciated the practical examples and clear explanations."
"This course has really helped me in knowing the causes and as I will be seeing and transferring patients I will have an understanding of what is going on with my patients."

"I liked the pace and the need for critical thinking needed for the understanding of the required concepts. Also, the knowledge of the sequence in colon cancer from adenoma to carcinoma. Finally, I liked the aspect of the prognosis of colon cancer and the post operative together with polypectomy surveillance."
"I found most interesting the surgical management of colonic cancer and screening program."
"I liked the good correlation between basic sciences and management."
"All parts of this course are interesting."
